feedback_text: I couldn't access the lecture video with my screen reader. The player had no captions.
Great explanations in week 3. The examples really helped.
The quiz closed before I could finish because the timer was too short.
Course content is clear but there is a lot to read each week.
Moving too fast — we covered two chapters in one week.
The PDF readings are not tagged properly for assistive technology.
Really enjoyed the discussion activities. Well structured.
Could not submit my assignment — upload button kept failing.
Some videos had poor audio quality and were hard to follow.
Deadlines feel rushed with little time between TMAs.
Font contrast on the course homepage is too low for me to read.
Excellent tutor feedback on my first assignment.
Platform logged me out during the exam and I lost my answers.
The module handbook is well organized and easy to navigate.
Too many readings assigned for a single week.
Screen reader could not read the labels on the quiz questions.
Best online course I have taken so far. Very engaging.
Website was down for maintenance during the due date.
Some content felt outdated compared to current industry practice.
Would prefer more time between the midterm and final project.
No transcript available for the week 2 video lectures.
Clear and concise teaching. I understood the material quickly.
My submission was marked late even though I uploaded on time.
The learning objectives for each week are very helpful.
The pace picked up suddenly after week 4.
Keyboard navigation does not work on the forum page.
Thank you for the supportive tutor responses.
Could not open the SCORM package in my browser.
Slides are dense but the summaries at the end help.
Fall behind once and it is very hard to catch up.
Alt text missing on most images in the course materials.
Very satisfied with how the course is run.
Error message when trying to access the library link.
Good balance of theory and practical exercises.
Weekly workload is inconsistent — some weeks are overwhelming.
Video player controls are not reachable with keyboard only.
Outstanding course design. Would recommend to others.
File upload limit was too small for my assignment.
Instructions for the final project were confusing.
Need an extra week before the final assessment.
Color-only indicators used without text labels — inaccessible.
Really appreciate the optional extension activities.
Mobile app crashes when opening week 5 resources.
Core concepts are explained well with good examples.
First half was slow then everything was due at once.
Cannot enlarge text without breaking the page layout.
Positive learning experience overall.
Discussion forum notifications never arrived.
Reading list is relevant and up to date.
Would like slower progression in the early weeks.
Automated captions are inaccurate and unusable for deaf students.
Module team responds quickly to questions.
VLE timed out while I was completing the quiz.
Assessment criteria are clearly explained.
Too much new material introduced in week 7.
Download links for audio files return a 404 error.
Love the interactive diagrams in this module.
Some external links in the bibliography are broken.
Content difficulty jumps sharply in the second half.
High contrast mode is not supported on the course site.
